summary: Added EldritchCrabEntity with TC4 Flags NBT, helm chance, sounds, leap, head-latch and drop behaviour.
Added EldritchCrabSpawnerBlock/BlockEntity with TC4 count cadence, activation range, cap and facing persistence.
Added crab renderer and createCrabBodyLayer based on original ModelEldritchCrab part names.
Converted Guardian/Warden/Golem renderers to use baked ModelPart roots through TC4BakedEldritchModel.
Added GenLibraryRoom and GenNestRoom adapters and mapped crab spawner palette codes to a real spawner block.
known_remaining_drift: Crab helm break uses a vanilla iron chestplate fallback until crimson plate armor items are registered.
Library/nest room adapters still need full block palette parity for loot urns/crates, crystals and Eldritch Nothing blocks.
Full Guardian/Golem model trees are not yet completely migrated.
